Concept: Cells and Modules

Creator

Description


Usage List:

  • Appears as Cells and Modules in Diagram Pretreat Battery in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Cells and Modules in Diagram Mechanically/Chemically Pretreat Material in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
